sourceNotes: Static conservative validation for custom SCP creation.
Official SCP Foundation series pages list established series from SCP-001 through SCP-9999, with Series 10 active from SCP-9000 upward.
This file blocks the long-established published ranges and known early Series 10 entries. Numbers in active higher Series 10 ranges should still be checked manually before public posting.

blockedRanges.reason: This number is inside the established official SCP-001 to SCP-8999 catalogue range.
This number is listed in Series 10 as an existing SCP entry.

warningRanges.reason: Series 10 is active. This number may become occupied, so double-check the SCP Wiki if you plan to share it seriously.
